content:
Like a well-designed advertisement, all project elements should work together to create one cohesive message. Compositions can contain visual, motion, audio, and textual elements. Some traits under these elements will be emphasized to stress importance while others deemphasized. Your choices regarding how you use these elements and traits will be crucial. There is a significant difference between choosing a background color because it “looks cool” and picking a background color that corresponds with your message and highlights your document's crucial features.

—————————

Week 2 Narrative Essay

Thank you for your submission!
The main thing I would like to see you improve moving into the following major assignment is to hone in on creating a solid thesis statement complete with its organizational framework.

A thesis statement:

—tells the reader how you will interpret the significance of the subject matter under discussion.

—is a road map for the paper; in other words, it tells the reader what to expect from the rest of the paper.
context: From document: Week 1 Retention Tracking — chunk 125 (chunk 125/133)
